titleStmt.title: SII 33.227: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 227. (A.R. No. B 268 of 1953.) Ēlūru, Eluru Taluk, West Godavari District.

summary.p: Lift side pillar (top) in the Vishṇumaṇḍapa, Fort at Gandhakam.
This is dated Śaka 1234, Parīdhāvi, Phālguna ba. 1, Monday corresponding to 1313 A.D. Febraury 12.

States that the leṅkas, Sahavāsis and others, who had come to Dendulūru on sthalatārkkaṇa (?), purchased land from Maṁchchana, son of Kēśava-śeṭṭi and granted to god Bhīmanātha for daily offerings. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of Pratāparudradēva-mahārāja (Kakatīya king).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1234 guneṁṭṭi parīdhāvi
saṁvvatsara phālguṇa ba 1 sō deṁdulūri dēvasthānamu
bhīmēśvara śrīmanmahādēvaraku deṁdulūri sthalatārkkāṇaku
vaccina leṁkalū sahavāsulu bōyuluṁnu Ācarija
nulunnucūḍatara deṁdulūri kēśavaśeṭṭiṁgāri koḍkulu ma
ṁccanaṁgāri cātanu pōtunnūri polēṭi ceṟvaṁ dakṣiṇaṁ vaḷita
ṁkṣamatamulōni varivritti kha nūnukālōcitamū
lyānaku vilcikoni bhīmanāthadēvaralosagi Upahārāna

ku pratāparudradēvamahārājulakuṁbuṇyamugāṁbe
ṭṭitimi Īdharmmamu nālugu vāḍla sthānāpatulu mūnu
Ācaṁdrārkkamugāsēsi Upāhāramu
dināvāsaramu dinacariyaḍappakuṁḍanaḍapaṁga
lavāramu maṁggaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
